scripts.build: bun run --filter @mindpass/test-server build && bun run --filter @mindpass/core build && bun run --filter @mindpass/protocols build && bun run --filter @mindpass/discovery build && bun run --filter mindpass-cli build && bun run --filter mindpass-docs build
scripts.test: bun run --filter @mindpass/core test && bun run --filter @mindpass/protocols test && bun run --filter @mindpass/discovery test && bun run --filter mindpass-cli test
scripts.typecheck: bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/test-server/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/protocols/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/discovery/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p docs/tsconfig.json
scripts.check: bun run --filter @mindpass/test-server check && bun run --filter @mindpass/core check && bun run --filter @mindpass/protocols check && bun run --filter @mindpass/discovery check && bun run --filter mindpass-cli check && bun run --filter mindpass-docs check && bun run --filter @examples/ows check
